sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50720" key="i(ppi/dion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱππίδιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n50720.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a</tr_> kind of <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:44" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
